docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALBEE, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT IT'S ALL THAT INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SNEAKY TIKI JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
